problem id: 3bda588a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) XOR NOT SHL(4)) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  00111100 -> 11011111
  00101001 -> 00100111
  01010100 -> 00011111
  11110010 -> 01011110
  11101001 -> 00111101
  00100100 -> 10011110
  11011010 -> 10011011
  00100111 -> 10110110
  11100010 -> 11011100

query: 11111001
predicted answer: 10111111
